content.question: What is the causal effect of school closure specifically (as opposed to pre-existing out-migration) on subsequent depopulation rates in Hungarian villages, accounting for local socioeconomic and segregation dynamics?
content.reduction_path: Commission a difference-in-differences regression study using Hungarian municipality-level data (2005–2025) comparing depopulation trajectories before and after documented school closures, stratified by village size, Roma population concentration, and distance to urban centers, with robustness checks for confounding by housing costs and employment availability
